gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance, and a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system; career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact, and students clutch resumes inside branded folders, while tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps, and dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor; additionally, healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos, and consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, and students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens; alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, while healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos, tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps, and dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor; students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, and event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance, while career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact, and students clutch resumes inside branded folders; additionally, alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station, and a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables; at the entrance, event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards, where healthcare providers are showcasing community outreach photos, and a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system; dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, and tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps; students are lining up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, clutching resumes inside branded folders, while career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact; additionally, alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station.

Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: A welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system, and event staff are scanning registrations and handing out lanyards at the entrance, where healthcare providers are showcasing community outreach photos, and dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor; students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, clutching resumes inside branded folders; consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, and tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps, while career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact, and additionally, alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps, and dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor; additionally, healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos, and career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact, while students clutch resumes inside branded folders; alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station; consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, and at the entrance, event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards, while students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, and a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, and students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, clutching resumes inside branded folders; at the entrance, event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards, while dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, and tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps, where healthcare providers are showcasing community outreach photos, and a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system; furthermore, career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact, and alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
